kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=iqs, url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Select Random BookingId From Booking List
GET /booking
GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking path_url=/booking headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.4', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

${response} = <Response [200]>
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.msg: ${response} = <Response [200]>

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.msg: ${bookingid} = 1054
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.msg: ${bookingid} = 1054

kw.name: DELETE /booking/${bookingid}
Get token
POST /auth
Load Json From File
kw.msg: ${payload} = {'username': 'admin', 'password': 'password123'}

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth path_url=/auth headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.4', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '48', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "admin", "password": "password123"}'

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${token} = b469b16ed24b5b9
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.msg: ${token} = b469b16ed24b5b9

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${headers} = {'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Cookie': 'token=b469b16ed24b5b9'}

C:\Users\simon\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'restful-booker.herokuapp.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
${response} = <Response [200]>
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.msg: ${response} = <Response [200]>

kw.name: Should Not Have Value In Json
kw.doc: Should Not Have Value In JSON using JSONPath
